description:
You are helping a research project coordinator set up a project timeline in TiddlyWiki for an NIH-funded longitudinal health study. The wiki already has 'Project Overview' and 'Team Members' tiddlers providing context. Create five milestone tiddlers tagged 'Milestone' with custom fields 'due-date' (YYYYMMDD format) and 'status'.

Milestone: 'IRB Protocol Submission'
due-date: 20250215
status: completed
Body: Submit amended IRB protocol #2024-0847 for the longitudinal cardiovascular cohort study to the University of Michigan IRBMED. Protocol covers enrollment of 500 participants across three community health centers in Detroit, Flint, and Ann Arbor.

Milestone: 'Equipment Procurement'
due-date: 20250301
status: completed
Body: Procure and install ambulatory blood pressure monitors (Oscar 2 devices ×25), body composition analyzers (InBody 270 ×3), and point-of-care lipid panel analyzers (Cholestech LDX ×5) across all three study sites. Includes vendor selection and staff calibration training.

Milestone: 'Participant Recruitment Phase 1'
due-date: 20250430
status: in-progress
Body: Recruit and enroll the first 120 participants from partnered community health centers in Detroit and Flint. Target demographics: adults aged 35-75 with at least one cardiovascular risk factor. Enrollment includes baseline health assessment, blood draw, and 24-hour ABPM placement.

Milestone: 'Interim Data Analysis'
due-date: 20250715
status: pending
Body: Perform interim analysis on baseline and 3-month follow-up data from the first recruitment cohort. Primary endpoints: change in systolic blood pressure, LDL cholesterol, and HbA1c. Generate descriptive statistics and preliminary mixed-effects models.

Milestone: 'Year 1 Progress Report to NIH'
due-date: 20251201
status: pending
Body: Compile and submit Year 1 progress report to NIH NHLBI for grant R01-HL-163892 via eRA Commons. Report must include enrollment statistics, preliminary safety data, protocol deviations, and updated budget justification.

Create a dashboard tiddler titled 'Project Timeline' tagged 'Dashboard' that uses a <$list> widget with a filter containing tag[Milestone] and sort[due-date] to display all milestones in chronological
